reason: Agent "QA-20260505-175635-lrmp" successfully received a message, processed it, and returned the correct response "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including "QA-20260505-175635-lrmp" with idle status.
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260505-175635-lrmp" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing the agent configuration and message input area.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator displayed "idle", which satisfies the requirement of "running" or "idle".
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field (ref=e193) and sent using the send button (ref=e298). A new session "Math Basics Quick Question" was created.
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded in 2 seconds. Status changed to "working" during processing, then returned to "idle" when complete.

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displayed "4" as the answer. Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message on the right and agent response "4" with "Worked for 2s" indicator below it.
